title: Software Update - DFU -  Going to sleep mode during update
scenario: DFU continues successfully after mobile phone exits sleep mode during firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
2. Connect to the Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) from the Device Settings screen.
5. During the DFU process, allow the mobile phone to enter sleep mode (e.g., press the Power button or let the screen time out).
6. Wait for a few seconds while the phone is in sleep mode.
7. Wake the phone from sleep mode (e.g., press the Power button or tap the screen).
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and observe the DFU status.
expected: The DFU process should continue running or complete successfully. The app should show the update progress or completion status when the user returns from sleep mode.
